name: Jellyfish Bridge
description: Exposes Jellyseerr, Radarr and Sonarr behind Jellyfin authentication so the Jellyfish mobile client only needs a single Jellyfin connection. Jellyseerr calls are attributed to the matching Jellyfin user via jellyfinUserId mapping.
overview: Bridge between Jellyfin and Jellyseerr / Radarr / Sonarr for the Jellyfish mobile app.

versions.changelog:
ci: fetch annotated tags so the changelog comes from the tag, not the commit

actions/checkout@v4 with only fetch-depth: 0 leaves annotated tags as
lightweight refs on the runner, so `git for-each-ref %(contents)` falls
back to the commit message — that's why v0.1.0.3 ended up with the
commit body (and its trailers) in the published manifest. fetch-tags
forces the action to pull the full tag objects.
